author: lOrm
content: Replaced twin booleans is_error/is_thinking + stringly-typed role on DisplayMessage with MessageKind enum (User, Assistant, Thinking, SystemInfo, SystemError, ToolStart{name}, ToolOk{name}, ToolErr{name}). Also introduced Role, Mode, EffortLevel enums across messages.rs and app.rs. 47 call sites migrated, 0 old patterns remain, 28 new tests added. Build clean, clippy clean, 1204/1204 tests pass.
